evals.prompt: Analyze my recent sessions and show me what patterns you find
evals.expected_output: Checks for Entire CLI. Runs entire status and entire explain. Identifies patterns (retry loops, successes, issues). Writes structured reflection to .claude/reflections.md. Shows summary to user with confidence levels.

evals.prompt: Reflect on my sessions — I don't have Entire installed
evals.expected_output: Checks for Entire CLI, detects it's missing. Reports that Entire CLI is required and links to https://entire.io. Does NOT create any files or attempt analysis.

evals.prompt: /reflect and bake — I have a CLAUDE.md but no .claude/agents/ directory
evals.expected_output: Analyzes sessions, produces reflection. HIGH confidence insights are baked into CLAUDE.md under a ## Session Insights section. Does NOT create agent files. Marks baked insights as BAKED in reflections.md.

evals.prompt: /reflect and bake — I have .claude/agents/builder.md with a ## Project-Specific Rules section
evals.expected_output: Analyzes sessions, produces reflection. Builder-relevant HIGH confidence insights are appended to .claude/agents/builder.md's ## Project-Specific Rules section. Other insights go to CLAUDE.md. Does NOT overwrite existing rules.
Only analyzes the 2 most recent sessions (not the default 5). Produces reflection scoped to those sessions. Writes to .claude/reflections.md.
